document_summary: Cover and Table of Contents of 'Market Research and Application' book edited by Dehuan Liu, published by Peking University Press in 2006. The book covers market segmentation, product testing, marketing channels, brand research, customer satisfaction, advertising research and more. Liu is identified as Editor-in-Chief with a Ph.D. in Sociology from Peking University.

snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu

snippets.text: Dehuan Liu, male, holds a Ph.D. in Sociology from Peking University. He serves as the Vice Dean of School of Journalism and Communication at Peking University, the Deputy Director of Center for Market and Media Research at Peking University, and the President of National Market Research Association. His major publications include the national key textbooks Modern Market Research, Market Survey Textbook, Market Survey, Theoretical Basis and Practical Methods of Social Survey, Perspectives on Chinese People's Reading Lives, and Survey on Project Hope, among others. He has published over 40 papers, including "Questionnaire Design," "Analysis of Influential Factors on Internet Dependence," "Research on Beijing Newspaper Odd- Listing Market," and "The Application of Age Variable in Data Analysis," among others.
